```python
def edit_distance(a, b):
    m, n = len(a), len(b)
    # Use two rows for space efficiency: only keep previous and current row
    prev = list(range(n + 1))
    for i in range(1, m + 1):
        curr = [i] * (n + 1)
        for j in range(1, n + 1):
            cost = 0 if a[i - 1] == b[j - 1] else 1
            curr[j] = min(prev[j] + 1, curr[j - 1] + 1, prev[j - 1] + cost)
        prev = curr
    return prev[n]
```
